fs_root_protect.name: Filesystem Root Protection
fs_root_protect.description: Prevents deletion or modification of system root directories

shell_pipe_protect.name: Shell Pipe Injection Protection
shell_pipe_protect.description: Prevents dangerous pipe-to-shell patterns like 'curl | bash'

sensitive_data_protect.name: Sensitive Data Protection
sensitive_data_protect.description: Prevents sending sensitive data (API keys, passwords) to external services
